title: AXUploadRequest
description: Represents a file upload request with progress tracking, status management, and event handling.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the file being uploaded.

props.name: ext
props.description: The file extension extracted from the filename.

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the file in bytes.

props.name: file
props.description: The original File object being uploaded.

props.name: progress
props.description: Signal containing the upload progress percentage (0-100).

props.name: estimateTime
props.description: Signal containing the estimated time remaining for upload in milliseconds.

props.name: status
props.description: Signal containing the current upload status.

props.name: message
props.description: Signal containing any status message or error message.

props.name: isDetermined
props.description: Signal indicating whether the upload progress has been determined.

props.name: metaData
props.description: Additional metadata associated with the upload request.

props.name: onCancel
props.description: Subject that emits when the upload is canceled.

props.name: onStart
props.description: Subject that emits when the upload starts.

props.name: onFailed
props.description: Subject that emits when the upload fails.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Subject that emits when the upload completes.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets the number of bytes transferred during upload.
 * @param value - The number of bytes transferred
 */
setTransferredBytes(value: number)

/**
 * Starts the upload process.
 * @returns Promise that resolves when upload starts
 */
upload(): Promise<void>

/**
 * Cancels the upload and resets progress.
 */
cancel(): void

/**
 * Restarts the upload process.
 */
redo(): void

/**
 * Marks the upload as failed with an error message.
 * @param message - The error message
 */
error(message: string): void

/**
 * Marks the upload as completed.
 * @param data - Optional data to pass with completion
 */
finish(data?: any): void

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the AXUploadRequest class.
